title: Brahma Rudrulu
subTitle: Justice Jagadish Chandra Prasad, a disciple of law, decides to fight a case for his nephew Satyam, who is framed for the murder of Jyothi, his classmate and lover.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Mooga Manasulu
subTitle: Gopinath and Radha, a newlywed couple, embark on their honeymoon. However, their trip takes an unexpected turn when Gopinath begins experiencing flashbacks of his past life.

title: Navul Navul
subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Roommates
subTitle: Four poor musicians get framed in a murder case which lands them in jail. So, they escape with hopes of proving their innocence.

title: Peddamma Thalli
subTitle: Goddes Peddamma Thalli intervenes to protect her faithful devotees from evil schemes of wicked people who are hell-bent on destroying the lives of the innocent.

title: Shankardada Zindabad
subTitle: A local goon, Shankar, pretends to be a professor to get close to a radio jockey, Jahnavi. But when the old-age home Jahnavi runs is in danger, Shankar is forced to reveal his true job.

title: Ammoru Thalli
subTitle: Orphan Durga grows up believing that Goddess Kamakshi is her mother. When an international criminal gang and a magician try to steal from an ancient temple, the goddess herself descends on earth.

title: Two Countries
subTitle: Ullas schemes to marry Simran, woman with a disability, to avoid repaying a debt, but faces complications when Laya, a wealthy alcoholic, enters his life, turning his plans upside down.

title: Dictator
subTitle: Chandu lives happily with his family in Hyderabad. However, things take a turn when he gets arrested for a crime he did not commit.

title: Tappuchesi Pappukudu
subTitle: Sivaji is desperate for money when he meets his old friend Ramesh, a con artist. They rob a bank with Pedda and Cheecha, but Pedda gets arrested without telling the rest where he hid the money.

title: Thandra Paparayudu
subTitle: An Indian freedom fighter ignites a revolution against the French, long before the British establish their reign of terror. Soon, he sparks the fight for liberation in India.

subTitle: When a man is accused of murder and lands in prison, he breaks out from jail cross-dressed as a woman to nab the actual culprits.

title: Prema Chesina Pelli
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Manasu Paddanu Kaani
subTitle: Though Venu loves Madhavi, he requests Swati, who has feelings for him, to act like his wife when his father's health starts deteriorating. Eventually, Venu finds himself getting drawn towards Swati.

title: Tholi Prema
subTitle: Fate offers Aditya and Varsha the opportunity to rekindle their youthful romance years after personality differences compelled them to go their separate ways.

title: Raayan
subTitle: Kathavaraayan, a food-truck owner, leads an honest life with his three siblings. However, a chain of unfortunate events pushes him into the world of crime.

title: Kalidasu
subTitle: An orphan is on the run after killing his father's murderer, and is brought up by a fruit vendor. Later, he saves a rich girl from the clutches of an evil politician.

title: Rebel
subTitle: After his parents are brutally murdered, Rishi sets out on a quest to find the killers. He finds that his own uncle, who has now disguised himself as Robert, is involved in the killings.

title: Panjaa
subTitle: Jai, who is mentored by a gangster, Bhagavan, grows up to be a henchman. However, things take a turn when Jai murders Bhagavan's son.

subTitle: Krishna Rao and Rukmini fall in love with each other and decide to get married. However, trouble brews in their relationship when Krishna Rao develops feelings for a colleague.

subTitle: A group of friends try to navigate their lives, careers and relationship while hurdling through various challenges life poses in front of them.

title: Krishna Gaadi Veera Prema Gaadha
subTitle: Krishna falls in love with Mahalakshmi whose brother is a henchman of a don. During a gang war, he entrusts the responsibility of children to Krishna and asks him to return them to their parents.

title: King
subTitle: The heir to a large estate is killed by his conniving relatives. Meanwhile, his lookalike, a gangster, falls in love with a singer and impersonates a software engineer to impress her.

title: Gopala Gopala
subTitle: Gopala, an atheist, sues God after an earthquake destroys his shop, but his life takes a miraculous turn when he meets Govinda Hari.

title: 1-Nenokkadine
subTitle: Name of the film Ek Ka Dum Language Hindi (Dub) Starcast Mahesh Babu, Kriti Sanon, Nassar, Kelly Dorji, Sophie Choudhary, others Genre Action-Thriller Director Sukumar Producer Riwaz Duggal Banner RK Duggal Studios Music Director Devi Sri Prasad Theatrical Release date 1/10/2014 Censor Certificate Rating U/A Story of a rockstar who lost his parents in his childhood and doesn't completely remember the people who killed them. How he eventually finds and kills them forms the cruz of the story.

title: Simharaasi
subTitle: A charitable man respects all women and does not tolerate injustice. He brings his struggling stepsister home to live in comfort after their father commits suicide.
